name: 5'x7' Tropical Ikat Rectangular Woven Area Rug - Threshold™
description:
Spruce up your indoor or outdoor decor with this Tropical Ikat Rectangular Woven Area Rug from Threshold™. This rug features a vibrant tropical Ikat pattern with delicate tassels along the ends, adding a playful touch to your flooring. Designed with a flat-pile construction and spray-latex backing, it’s a great choice for high-traffic areas. Plus, it can be easily cleaned with a hose for effortless upkeep.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
